title: SOC 2 Type II Pre-Audit Vulnerability Scan
description: Run full vulnerability scan across production environment ahead of SOC 2 Type II audit scheduled for next week. Must cover all EC2 instances, RDS endpoints, EKS node groups, and externally-facing load balancers. Generate remediation plan for any Critical or High findings.

title: Emergency Patch Status Check — Critical CVE
description: CVE-2024-0001 (CVSS 9.8) was published 2 hours ago affecting OpenSSL 3.x. Immediately audit all systems for vulnerable OpenSSL versions and identify unpatched instances. Generate priority patch schedule.

title: Quarterly Access Rights Audit
description: Conduct quarterly review of all IAM roles, service accounts, and user permissions across AWS and internal systems. Flag any violations of least-privilege principle, dormant accounts (>90 days inactive), and any accounts with overly permissive wildcard policies.

title: NIST 800-53 Control Verification
description: Verify implementation of NIST 800-53 Rev 5 controls for the upcoming FedRAMP assessment. Focus on AC (Access Control), AU (Audit and Accountability), SC (System and Communications Protection), and SI (System and Information Integrity) control families.

title: Data Encryption Compliance Check
description: Audit all data stores for encryption at rest and in transit compliance. Check S3 bucket policies, RDS encryption settings, EBS volume encryption, EFS encryption, and ensure all inter-service communication uses TLS 1.2+. Report any plaintext data exposures.
